violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. The chemical bucket was switched and was not primed not observing the correct chlorine concentration in the final rinse cycle.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Prep table caulking along wall near deep fryers and kettles is not in good repair.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. Grill spatulas are stored in a bus bin that have debris build up.

inspections.comments: Waremachine was not properly sanitizing at the time of inspection. Establishment manager was aware of the issue and was completing the sanitizing step separately until machine is re-calibrated by the service provider.

violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained. Observed debris build up on the ice chute and on the ice stop bar mounted on the top of the ice bin interior. Observed debris build up around ice bin door.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in walk in cooler.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the ware-washing area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Racks in clean utensil storage area and in the walk in cooler noted not in good repair.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean Food equipment noted stored in an unprotected location. Observed clean spatulas in front grill area sitting in debtis laiden water. Observed damaged and rusty clean utensil storage racking near dish washing area.
